data.title: Swiss National Bank President Reportedly Dismisses Bitcoin as Reserve Asset
data.description:
• Swiss National Bank (SNB) President Martin Schlegel dismissed the idea of adding bitcoin to the central bank’s reserves.
  • Schlegel cited volatility, liquidity concerns, and security risks as reasons against the move.
  • His words come as a Swiss citizens' initiative is pushing for the SNB to hold bitcoin and gold as part of its reserves.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Finally Snap Eight-Day $3.2B Outflow Streak With $94.3M Inflows
data.description:
• Spot bitcoin ETFs saw $94.3 million in inflows on Feb. 28, ending an eight-day outflow streak.
  • In those eight days, the 11 spot bitcoin ETFs trading in the U.S. saw outflows above $3.2 billion.
  • Bitcoin price recovered to $84,900 after hitting a low of $78,000 on Feb. 28.

data.title: Crypto Prices Show Signs of Recovery With Bitcoin Above $84k Amid Trump's Summit Plans
data.description:
• Bitcoin’s price has risen above $84,400, while the broader CoinDesk 20 Index rose more than 1.5% in a day.
  • U.S. President Donald Trump will host a crypto summit on March 7, featuring prominent figures from the industry
  • BlackRock has added its spot bitcoin ETF to one of its model portfolios.

data.title: Donald Trump-Linked Firm May be Looking to Start NFT and Metaverse Platform
data.description:
• DTTM Operations has filed a trademark with the USPTO, potentially indicating a move towards non-fungible tokens (NFTs) and a metaverse platform.
  • The trademark application includes blockchain-based goods and services, such as NFT access, cryptocurrency transaction management, and game software featuring crypto tokens for use in virtual worlds.
  • The filing suggests the platform may include digital collectibles featuring images, sounds, videos, and texts of Donald Trump.

data.title: Why DeFi Projects Could Be Ready to Outperform: Kaiko Research
data.description:
• DeFi protocols may outperform in the second half of 2025, according to Kaiko Research.
  • The Trump administration may bring long-needed regulatory clarity to these projects.
  • Kaiko emphasized the potential of individual tokens like UNI, ONDO and AAVE.

data.title: Here's How Mainland China May Allow Chinese Traders Access to Bitcoin
data.description:
• There might be a day when Beijing allows Hong Kong's crypto ETFs to be traded in the Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) program, which allows Chinese to buy and sell foreign stocks.
  • This program would allow mainland Chinese investors to get crypto exposure without owning the underlying asset.

data.title: Coinbase, NEAR, Others Form Alliance to Develop Open AI Services
data.description:
• A group of big-name crypto and blockchain entities have joined forces to deliver open AI services using combined infrastructure.
  • The aim of the alliance is to "ensure secure, open source, economical, and fair AI access."

data.title: BlackRock Adds Its IBIT Bitcoin ETF To Alternative Asset Model Portfolio
data.description:
• BlackRock has added a 1% to 2% allocation of the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) to its model portfolio that allows for alternative assets.
  • This marks the first time BlackRock has included IBIT in any of its models, a move that could signal broader institutional adoption of bitcoin.
  • BlackRock’s model portfolios manage around $130 billion, and while this is a smaller allocation, it could influence advisors and platforms that follow these models.

data.title: Bitcoin Dip-Buyers Step in Friday, but What Might Weekend Action Bring?
data.description:
• Bitcoin bounced during U.S. hours Friday as the Crypto Fear & Greed Index overnight hit levels not seen since the depths of the 2022 bear market.
  • Weekends have not been kind to crypto prices for a long string of weeks.
  • The bad news this time around, however, might be more than priced in.

data.title: Bitdeer Buys the Bitcoin Dip With BTC Price Set for Worst Month in Three Years
data.description:
• Bitdeer said it bought 50 BTC at an average price of $81,475
  • The company added to its bitcoin treasury as the price of the largest cryptocurrency is on track for its worst month since June 2022.
  • Bitdeer shares fell 0.64% at the start of trading on Friday.
